details: Compound 11f heading '4-(Diphenylphosphoryl)-6-(3-Methoxyphenyl)-7H-Indeno[2,1-c]Quinolin-7-One (11f)' with mp 283°C-285°C in section 6.3.2.5; DOI 10.1002/cmdc.202500751 confirmed in paper.

Topsentin C paper (PMC6193241) lists 'tert-Butyl 3-{1-[(Pivaloyloxy)amino]-2-nitroethyl}-5-bromo-1H-indole-1-carboxylate (7b)' with mp 108-109 °C; journal DOI 10.1055/s-00000084 appears in article files.
Table 5 row 'meso-Erythritol 149-32-6 Sugar Alcohol 337.76±7.51 118.7±0.21 120.4±0.17' confirms DSC_peak 120.4; DOI 10.3390/ma13204486 present in muller_2020 PDF.
Section 3.1.4 'Synthesis of O-Ethyl N-phenylcarbamothioate (4)' yields compound 4 with mp 55-56 °C; DOI 10.3390/molecules26175383 confirmed in alsayari_2021.
Table 8 of PMC6146921 lists '31. 3.3-dimethyl-1-butanol 143.00 ...' as experimental boiling point; source_url PMC URL maps to the paper.

Synthesis section reports compound 6e '4-((Methyl((1R,2R,3R,5S)-2,6,6-trimethylbicyclo[3.1.1]heptan-3-yl)amino)methyl)-N-(4-methyl-3-...)benzamide' with mp 118–120 °C; DOI 10.3390/ph19020198 confirmed.

PMC6146883 experimental: 'Compound 21 was obtained as dark yellow crystals (45%), mp 194°C'; compound name '2-Amino-4-(coumarin-3'-yl)pyrimidine (21)' matches paper heading; DOI 10.3390/80700541 confirmed.
Synthesis section: '5-Acetyl-2-ethyl-6-phenyl-4-[(pyridin-4-ylmethyl)amino]pyridazin-3(2H)-one, 5i Yield = 50%; mp = 150–151 °C'; DOI 10.3390/molecules31040699 confirmed.
Compound 9j: 'Pink Solid (65%, 277 mg) (crystallized in iPrOH). M.p. = 201 – 202 °C'; DOI 10.3762/bjoc.20.154 confirmed in gomezayuso_2024 PDF.
Compound 2c heading '3-(2-furanyl)-6-(1-naphthylmethyl)-1,2,4-triazolo[3,4-b]-1,3,4-thiadiazole (2c): Yield 64%; Mp. 146-148°C'; DOI 10.3390/70800681 confirmed.
Table 1 of Yalkowsky 2014 lists 'Methylamine −94 89'; literature compilation counts as measured per Q3 rule; DOI 10.1002/jps.24034 confirmed.
Section 3.1 synthesis: 'N′-(1-(4-bromophenyl)ethylidene)-3-(...purin-8-yl)thio)propanehydrazide (AL6). M.p.: 264.5 °C (dec.)'; DOI 10.3390/antiox15020217 confirmed.
Table 5 row '46 2,3-dime-1-butanol 7.8889 2.7417 149.0' shows experimental bp 149.0 °C; DOI 10.3390/ijms12042448 confirmed.
Experimental: '...2,3-dimethylpyridinium bromide (3d). Yield 0.14 g (90%), yellow powder, mp 218°C (decomp.)'; DOI 10.1134/S1070428022030101 confirmed.
Section 3 synthesis: '6-(5-methoxy-2-nitrobenzyl)-6H-benzo[c]chromene (5p). Yield: 49%; Mp: 170 °C'; DOI 10.3390/molecules31040706 confirmed.

Experimental section: 'Compound 17b: orange crystals; m.p.179 °C (from methanol)'; compound 17b's complex octahydroimidazo-thieno-pyrimidine name matches scheme description; DOI 10.3390/71000756 confirmed.

Table 1 row '2e C16H13ClN2S (300.8) Cl 4-CH3 157-158 70' confirms mp; compound name 6-chloro-2-methyl-3-(4-methylphenyl)quinazoline-4(3H)-thione consistent with scaffold/substituents; DOI 10.3390/81100756 confirmed.
Compound 2i heading 'Dicarbonylcyclopentadienyl(4-ethoxycarbonylphenyl)iron (2i)' with 'm.p.: 104–106 °C'; DOI 10.3390/ma2030978 confirmed.
Experimental: '3-Hydroxy-2,2-dimethyl-3-(4-chlorophenyl)propanoic acid; C11H13ClO3; Mw = 228.67; Melting point: 142 °C'; PMC3685236 URL valid source identifier.
Synthesis: '5-Acetyl-4-(4-bromophenylamino)-2-ethyl-6-phenylpyridazin-3(2H)-one, 2l Yield = 70%; mp = 185–186 °C'; DOI 10.3390/molecules31040699 confirmed.

Review paper PMC6236399 lists 'Tyrindoleninone: [112] red needles, mp 109.5 °C' compiled from ref [112]; literature compilation of experimental value counts as measured per Q3; DOI 10.3390/60900736 confirmed.

Compound 6a section: '11-(Cyclohexylamino)-12-phenyl-9H-benzo[f]pyrrolo[1,2-d][1,2,3]triazolo[1,5-a][1,4]diazepine-13-carbonitrile (6a); White powder; yield: 166 mg (79%); mp 126-129 °C'; DOI 10.3762/bjoc.20.241 confirmed.
Synthesis of compound 5 '2-Hydroxy-3-hydroxymethyl-5-methylbenzaldehyde' gave 'yellowish needles (yield: 7.6g, 38%). M.p. 72-73° (lit.[7] 75-76°C)'; DOI 10.3390/61201001 confirmed.
Compound 4i heading exactly matches paper: '1-(4-trifluoromethylphenyl)-1-(2-fluorophenyl)-O,O-dimethylphosphonate (4i). Yield 26.6%; m.p. 110-111°C'; DOI 10.3390/80100186 confirmed.
Experimental: 'Compound 31 was obtained as yellowish green crystals (45%), mp 190°C'; section heading lists '6-Benzoyl-3-(benzocoumarin-3'-yl)isoxazole (31)'; DOI 10.3390/80700541 confirmed.
